name: meta
description: Meta plugin for the learn-yy-skills marketplace: the plugin-dev skill — a prescriptive guide to building a great skills marketplace and the plugins in it (repo layout, Claude + Codex dual manifests, version discipline, and what makes a plugin/skill worth installing). The same SKILL.md files back the Claude Code plugin.

interface.shortDescription: How to build a great skills marketplace + plugins
interface.longDescription: The meta plugin for the learn-yy-skills marketplace. Its plugin-dev skill is a prescriptive guide to building a great skills marketplace and the plugins that live in it: the repo layout, the Claude (.claude-plugin) + Codex (.agents/.codex-plugin) dual-manifest packaging, the version-bump discipline the marketplace auto-update keys off, and what makes a plugin/skill actually worth installing. The same SKILL.md files back the Claude Code plugin.
defaultPrompt: Help me set up a skills marketplace like this one
How should I structure a Claude + Codex plugin?
